title: Stage 3 Output
description: Output artifact of Stage 3 (code generation). Records the generated file paths relative to the repository root. Stage 4 reads this artifact to locate files for build and test.

plugin_file.description: Path to the generated plugin file, relative to the repository root.

test_file.description: Path to the generated test file, relative to the repository root.

register_file.description: Path to the register.go file where the plugin.Register() call was added.

tekton_artifacts.description: Tekton pipeline artifacts generated alongside the plugin.

values_yaml.description: Path to the generated Helm-style values.yaml for tektonc pipeline compilation

pipeline_stubs.description: Paths to generated PipelineRun stub files
